query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rasidRole ENUM('root','admin','smart_monitor_manager','monitoring_director','monitoring_specialist','monitoring_officer','requester','respondent','ndmo_desk','legal_advisor','director','board_secretary','auditor') DEFAULT 'monitoring_officer',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS username VARCHAR(64),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS passwordHash VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS displayName VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mobile VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS failedLoginAttempts INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lockedUntil TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailNotifications TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL;
